author: doll-agent
content:
Done. MaskedArray::argsort returned Vec<usize> while MaskedArray::sort returned a MaskedArray - inconsistent. Switched the return type to Array<u64, Ix1>, matching the indexing dtype used elsewhere in ferray (Element isn't impl'd for usize, hence u64). Inner logic unchanged.

Updated the one Rust test caller; no Python binding exists for ma argsort.

ferray-ma: 187 tests pass, clippy clean. Commit 59257b83.
